<style>
	.preview {
		display: flex;
	}
	@media (max-width: 767px) {
		.preview {
			display: block;
		}
		.card {
			margin: 0 auto;
		}
	}
	.card {
		position: relative;
		width: 300px;min-width: 300px;height: 400px;
		overflow: hidden;
		border-radius: 30px;
		background-color: #000000;
		background-image: url('./card__bg.jpg');background-size: 80%;background-repeat: no-repeat;background-position: 50% 50%;
		transition: all 0.3s ease;
		user-select: none
	}
	.card:hover {
		background-size: 140%;background-position: -10% 50%;
	}
	.card:hover > .card__panel_icos {
		left: 10px
	}
	.card:hover > .card__panel_name {
		bottom: 0;
		transition: all 0.3s ease;
	}
	.card__glass {

	}
	.card__panel {
		position: absolute;
	}
	.card__panel_icos {
		top: 10px;left: -50px;
		transition: all 0.3s ease
	}
	.card__panel_name {
		bottom: -100px;left: 0;
		width: 100%;height: 100px;
		background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
		transition: all 0.3s ease;
	}
	a, a:hover, a:active, a:visited, a:focus {
		border: none;
		outline: none;
	}
	.card__link {
		display: block;
		cursor: pointer;
	}
	.card__link:hover path,
	.card__link:active path,
	.card__link:focus path {
		fill: #990000;
	}
	.card__ico {
		width: 50px;
		height: 50px;
	}
	.card__ico > svg > path {
		fill: #FFFFFF;
		transition: all 0.3s ease;
	}
	.card__name {
		margin: 20px 0 0 0;
		font-size: 20px;
		color: #FFFFFF;
		text-align: center;
		text-transform: uppercase;
	}
	.card__position {
		color: #A5A5A5;
		text-align: center;
	}
	.greeting {
		margin: 0 0 0 20px
	}
	.greeting__title {
		font-size: 32px;
		display: flex;
		align-items: center;
	}
	hr {
		margin: 0;
	}
	.greeting__baloon {}
	.greeting__h2 {
		animation: lightning 2s linear 0s alternate infinite;
		text-shadow: 0 0 5px #990000, 0 0 15px #990000, 0 0 25px #990000, 0 0 35px #990000;
	}
	@keyframes lightning {
		0% { text-shadow: 0 0 5px #990000, 0 0 0px #990000, 0 0 0px #990000, 0 0 0px #990000 }
		20% { text-shadow: 0 0 5px #990000, 0 0 15px #990000, 0 0 25px #990000, 0 0 35px #990000 }
		40% { text-shadow: 0 0 5px #990000, 0 0 0px #990000, 0 0 0px #990000, 0 0 0px #990000 }
		100% { text-shadow: 0 0 5px #990000, 0 0 0px #990000, 0 0 0px #990000, 0 0 0px #990000 }
	}
	.greeting__p {}
	.slider {
		margin: 10px 0;
		width: 100%;
		max-width: 900px;
		height: 75px;
		overflow: hidden;
		position: relative;
	}
	.slider__row {
		display: flex;
		position: absolute;
	}
	.slider__item {
		display: flex;
		justify-content: center;
		align-items: center;
		margin-right: 25px;
		width: 75px;min-width: 75px;height: 70px;
	}
	@media (max-width: 1000px) {
		.slider__row {
			animation: caroosel 8s linear 0s infinite;
		}
	}
	@keyframes caroosel {
		0% {
			left: 0;
		}
		100% {
			left: -900px
		}
	}
</style>
